title: Letter to Santa Kit – Christmas Writing Set for Kids with Santa Letter, Thank You Note, 2 Envelopes & 21 Festive Stickers – Fun Holiday Activity for Children
features: 🎅 Magical Christmas Writing Set – Includes Santa letter, thank you note, festive envelopes & 21 stickers
🧒 Fun & Educational – Encourages handwriting, creativity, and thankfulness in a festive way
💌 2 Red & White Envelopes – With space to write your own address or message
🎨 21 Cute Stickers Included – Add festive flair with reindeer, Santa, snowmen and more

🧒 "Dear Santa" Letter Includes: Space to write the child's name Tick-box options for behaviour: ⬜ Good all of the time ⬜ Good some of the time ⬜ A little bit naughty Lines to write what the child would like most for Christmas Space to say "I have drawn a picture of you" Sign-off line: "Lots of love, ________" Fun P.S. section: "I will leave you and Rudolph a treat of _________"
description: Make magical Christmas memories with this adorable Letter to Santa Kit – the perfect festive activity for children to share their wishes with Santa and say thank you in return. Featuring colourful illustrations, reusable stickers, and festive envelopes, it's ideal for encouraging creativity and handwriting during the holiday season! ✨ What's Included: 📝 Letter to Santa – With guided prompts for name, behaviour, and wish list 🎁 Thank You Letter to Santa – Space for children to express their gratitude after Christmas 📮 2 Festive Envelopes – Red and white envelopes with space for writing, no pre-printed address 🎨 21 Christmas Stickers – Featuring Santa, reindeer, penguins, snowflakes, gifts & more! 🎄 Product Features: 🧒 Perfect for Children – A festive activity that promotes creativity, gratitude, and handwriting practice 🖊️ Personalised Touch – Kids can fill in their name and wishes for a truly special letter 📚 Ideal Holiday Craft – A fun way to get into the Christmas spirit at home or in school 🎅 High-Quality Print & Design – Bright, engaging colours with charming festive characters ✉️ Ready for Santa’s Postbox! – Just pop it into the included envelope and imagine the magic!
